rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: Lost in the Middle: How LMs Use Long Contexts (Liu et al.)
results.note: Diagnoses long-context attenuation but proposes no gradient-variance penalty or low-rank residual bypass; candidate explicitly acknowledges these papers diagnose but few prescribe fixes.

results.title: Context Discipline and Performance Correlation LLM (2026/01)
results.note: Empirical analysis of quality degradation under varying context lengths; no training-time gradient-norm regularizer or residual bypass mechanism.

results.title: Token Space Gradient Conflicts: Multi-Task Transformer (2025/07)
results.note: Per-token gradient manipulation but for multi-task gradient conflict resolution, not for variance-of-per-position-gradient-norms across long context; different objective and target.

results.title: Cutting the Skip: Training Residual-Free Transformers (2025/10)
results.note: Removes residual connections via Jacobian analysis; opposite direction from adding low-rank inverted-siphon residual bypass.

results.title: Learning to Skip Middle Layers of Transformers (2025/06)
results.note: Dynamic learned gate to bypass middle layers per sample; not a fixed low-rank LoRA bypass from input embedding to layer-K output, and no gradient-variance regularizer.

results.title: GateSkip Layers When Residual Gates Token-wise (2025/10)
results.note: Token-wise residual-stream gating for layer-skipping; gating mechanism not equivalent to additive low-rank long-range bypass, no position-uniform gradient objective.

results.title: Long Context Pre-Training with Lighthouse Attention (2026/05)
results.note: Hierarchical multi-resolution attention selection; explicitly contrasted by candidate's novelty claim; different mechanism (attention pattern vs gradient regularization + residual).

results.title: Value Residual Learning (ACL 2025)
results.note: Alternative residual connection patterns (value-side residuals) for transformer training; not low-rank input-to-deep-layer bypass and no gradient-variance objective.
